nasb.text: Behold, the eye of the Lord is on those who fear Him, On those who hope for His lovingkindness,

esv.text: Behold, the eye of the Lord is on those who fear him, on those who hope in his steadfast love,

cnv.text: 耶和華的眼睛看顧敬畏他的人， 和那些仰望他慈愛的人；

ccb.text: 但耶和华看顾敬畏祂、仰望祂慈爱的人。

csbs.text: 看哪，耶和华的眼目看顾敬畏他、期盼他慈爱的人；
